task: Implement the Sun* Kudos Live Board (F002): banner + compose entry, Highlight carousel, Spotlight word-cloud board, infinite-scroll All Kudos feed, likes/hearts, sidebar stats, Sunner profile page, kudos detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: SC-01: Like increments the card heart count by 1 and marks active; unlike reverses; both persist across reload
SC-02: A user's own kudos heart button is disabled/no-op; the toggle RPC rejects self-likes
SC-03: Highlight always shows at most 5 highest-hearted kudos; order updates after like changes
SC-04: A filter change updates both sections and resets All-Kudos to page 1
SC-05: Copy Link places the correct /kudos/{id} URL on the clipboard and a toast appears
SC-06: Infinite scroll loads further pages with no duplicated or skipped cards
SC-07: Spotlight node sizes correlate with received counts; clicking a node opens the correct detail
SC-08: Sidebar received/sent/hearts equal the DB counts for the current user
SC-09: Star badge count matches the 10/20/50 thresholds
SC-10: Anonymous card hides the sender identity, like works, and no user's hearts received changes
SC-11: Profile and Detail pages render real data read-only and return 404 on a missing id
SC-12: After integration, all board strings resolve through en/vi catalogs; no hardcoded JSX copy
touchpoints: components/kudos/*.tsx (card family, highlight, spotlight, all-kudos feed, sidebar, banner, compose entry)
blastRadius: Existing F001 Send Kudos flow (KudosModal reused unmodified; compose trigger visual changed from button to pill, which changed its accessible name)
profiles.department / hashtags tables (read-only, existing F001 schema, unaffected)
contracts: toggle_kudos_like(p_kudos_id uuid) returns jsonb {liked, heart_count} — SECURITY DEFINER, rejects self-like server-side
get_kudos_feed/get_highlight_kudos/get_spotlight_nodes/get_kudos_detail/get_kudos_stats — SQL STABLE RPCs, jsonb card/stats contract frozen in docs/features/F002_KudosLiveBoard/technical-spec.md
